title.es: Análisis de archivo de incidentes de empresa

description.en: Build a Python CLI script to validate and analyze incident CSV files based on CONTEXT-company.md, report invalid records and key metrics, and optionally export results to CSV.
description.es: Construye un script CLI en Python para validar y analizar archivos CSV de incidentes según CONTEXT-company.md, reportar registros inválidos y métricas clave, y exportar resultados a CSV opcionalmente.

sharing.en: I just completed Company Incident File Analysis with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Built a Python CLI to validate and analyze incident CSVs with export-ready metrics. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-company-incidents-analysis #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #dataanalysis #cli
